summary: AI Characters CMS API Testing Complete. All 23 pytest tests PASSED. Full CRUD operations for AI Battle Buddies CMS verified - public endpoints, admin endpoints, create/update/delete, seed functionality, and database integration with buddy-chat.
critical_code_review_comments: get_character_config() correctly loads from database first with fallback to hardcoded AI_CHARACTERS dict
Public endpoints correctly exclude 'prompt' field from responses for security
Admin endpoints correctly require Bearer token authentication
Character categories properly assigned (general, legal, wellbeing, addiction, family)
seed_data_creation: Tests create and clean up test characters. 8 hardcoded characters already seeded in database.
context_for_next_testing_agent: AI Characters CMS API is fully functional. All 8 hardcoded characters (tommy, doris, bob, sentry, hugo, margie, rita, catherine) are seeded in database. Tommy's description was updated via CMS to verify update flow. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_ai_characters_cms.py covers all CRUD operations plus integration verification.

GET /api/ai-characters.details: Returns 8 characters from database, excludes prompts, includes source=database

GET /api/ai-characters/{id}.details: Returns single character without prompt, 404 for non-existent

GET /api/ai-characters/admin/all.details: Returns all characters with full prompts, requires auth

GET /api/ai-characters/admin/{id}.details: Returns single character with full prompt, requires auth

POST /api/ai-characters.details: Creates new character, validates unique ID, requires auth

PUT /api/ai-characters/{id}.details: Updates character fields, requires auth, 404 for non-existent

POST /api/ai-characters/seed-from-hardco.details: Seeds from hardcoded values, skips existing, requires auth

buddy_chat_integration.details: get_character_config() loads from database first, buddy-chat uses char_config['prompt'] at line 4509

database_verification.tommy_updated: Description shows 'updated via CMS' or 'battle buddy' indicating CMS functionality works
